name: axial-campaign-content
description: Shared compendium module for the Axial campaign (PF1e)

scripts.unpack:equipment: node_modules/.bin/fvtt package unpack equipment --type Module --id axial-campaign-content --out src/equipment
scripts.unpack:bestiary: node_modules/.bin/fvtt package unpack bestiary --type Module --id axial-campaign-content --out src/bestiary
scripts.unpack:spells: node_modules/.bin/fvtt package unpack spells --type Module --id axial-campaign-content --out src/spells
scripts.unpack: npm run unpack:equipment & npm run unpack:bestiary & npm run unpack:spells
scripts.pack:equipment: node_modules/.bin/fvtt package pack src/equipment --type Module --id axial-campaign-content --out packs/equipment
scripts.pack:bestiary: node_modules/.bin/fvtt package pack src/bestiary --type Module --id axial-campaign-content --out packs/bestiary
scripts.pack:spells: node_modules/.bin/fvtt package pack src/spells --type Module --id axial-campaign-content --out packs/spells
scripts.pack: npm run pack:equipment & npm run pack:bestiary & npm run pack:spells
